content.text:
Advanced Statistics and Probability
Semester:
1  |
Type:
UEF12  |
VHS:
42h  |
Weekly hours:
3h  |
Lecture:
1h30  |
Tutorial:
1h30
Personal work VHS:
21h  |
Coefficient:
3  |
Credits:
4
Teaching Objectives
Understand the probabilistic foundations for data analysis
Master statistical modelling tools
Know how to apply hypothesis tests and construct confidence intervals
Be able to model uncertainty and interpret statistical results
Course Content (21h)
Chapter 1 – Foundations of Probability
Probability spaces
Discrete random variables
Continuous random variables
Random vectors and independence
Chapter 2 – Convergence and Limit Theorems
Characteristic functions
Law of large numbers
Central limit theorem
Chapter 3 – Inferential Statistics
Estimators and properties
Confidence intervals
Statistical hypothesis testing
Chapter 4 – Simulation and Applications
Simulation of random variables
Resampling methods (bootstrap)
Monte Carlo method
Assessment
Final examination (in person): 60%
Continuous assessment (CC): 40% — tests, personal work
Bibliography
Lecoutre B., Tassi Ph. (1987).
Statistique non paramétrique et robustesse
. Paris: Economica.
Tassi Ph. (1989).
Méthodes statistiques
. Paris: Economica.
Tassi Ph., Legait S. (1990).
Théorie des probabilités en vue des applications statistiques
. Paris: Ed. Technip.
Saporta, G.
Probabilités, Analyse des données et Statistique
. Technip, 2ème édition.
Jean-Pierre Lecoutre.
Statistique et probabilités
. Editions Dunod, 2012.
Yadolah Dodge, Valentin Rousson.
Analyse de régression appliquée
. Editions Dunod.
